seoTitle: Pilot Wilderness vs Pimlico Island — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pilot Wilderness and Pimlico Island. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pilot Wilderness vs Pimlico Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pilot Wilderness and Pimlico Island.
heading: Pilot Wilderness vs Pimlico Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pilot Wilderness, New South Wales and Pimlico Island, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pilot Wilderness has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Pimlico Island (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pilot Wilderness or Pimlico Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pilot Wilderness has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Pimlico Island scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pilot Wilderness scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Pimlico Island scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pilot Wilderness or Pimlico Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pilot Wilderness has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
